name: Blocky Merge
author: Poki
description: Blocky Merge is a puzzle game where you match and merge cubes of the same color or number. Race against the clock to clear lines of blocks before they stack too high! The more lines you clear, the higher you score, but don’t let the blocks hit the top, or it’s game over. Strategize your moves, merge cubes, and aim for the ultimate combo. Can you master the art of Blocky Merge and level up to victory? How to play Blocky Merge? Click to select a block. Click and hold to move it. Who created Blocky Merge? Blocky Merge is created by Ascabyrazygess. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Blocky Merge for free? You can play Blocky Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Blocky Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Blocky Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
